text.title: JAPANESE FISH MARKET! Finding Jiro (Dreams of Sushi)
text.u: yesterday we ran out of coffee and Cara
was pretty grumpy so this morning I'm
going to get her some coffee out of the
vending machine that looks like what
Karen
[Music]
needs and the wake
up thank you we're moving Apartments
today which means Cara has to repack her
bag oh the sit on technique
nice I can't do it all right we're about
to check out of our first Airbnb but
before we left I wanted to show you
around got to take your shoes off
because that's polite in Japanese
culture we' got this uh small little
kitchen over here a washer right
there and here is the
bathroom complete with a bedet as well
as an entire room that is a
shower and a bathtub and finally the
bedroom hello and
Cara so when we originally booked this
Airbnb we thought it was queen-size bed
but it turns out it was actually two
separate twin beds so we haven't slept
together well beside each other just not
together and last but not
least a balcony with a fantastic view of
Shinjuku
Tokio also our Airbnb came with a guide
book book all of these
appliances only have Kani
symbols so we would have no clue how to
operate anything in this
apartment without this book there were
no instructions for the toilet but the
pictures kind of help you figure it out
and if you get it wrong it's a little
bit of a
surprise God how do I turn this off go
off stop
can't wait till not to wear a coat
anymore I'm also cutting off all my
hair this went better than last
time oh my gosh I'm
dying so terrible I'm getting rid of all
of my stuff we got our heavy backpack
strapped on ready to move to our next
location and
now so we're just standing here with our
heavy bags we have two more kns left
here in Tokyo tonight we're going to be
staying at a capsule
hotel which Cara calls the morg yes it
is we're both pretty excited about
that smells like smoke and it kind of
looks like something out of a horror
movie Cara's going to kill me one last
time at Mr
donut we made it how long did it take
too
[Music]
long
[Music]
[Music]
[Applause]
[Music]
he
[Music]
we're at the market this place is
absolutely
fastic people everywhere and there are
literally restaurants like every five
steps we have literally walked around
the entire market and looked at every
sing option for places to eat we've
decided
[Music]
this so we got cheek sushi on the street
which thought was going to be amazing it
was pretty good it took me a really long
time to
[Music]
chew so we had that was weird but it was
it tasted
[Music]
good
[Applause]
[Music]
the people Street the street of the woo
I love this street we're on Cho Street
in ginzo which is like the shopping
capital of Tokyo and they close the
street down on the weekends so people
can walk tons of stores that I can't go
in because is I can't afford it like
that
one and that one and that
one all of
them okay so Nate and I have this
documentary that we love it's called
hero Dreams of Sushi and hero is this
really cute old man from Tokyo who is
the best sushi chef in the world it cost
$160 per person to eat at this
restaurant we're not going to eat at it
we're just going to look we did some
Googling we think the restaurant's in
the subway station which I do not
remember from the movie but according to
the
internet oh this is totally it we found
it this is the door from the documentary
if you have Netflix and you haven't
watched e word dreams ofi doing tonight
in the and you will appreciate the scene
of the Vlog so much more
this is the door to the kitchen Hero's
probably right
inside is that him I can't see tell me
if it is I'm not leaving till I see him
we're leaving we didn't see
him car's convinced that I leading her
astray we'll keep you
boting I don't think you're leaving me
astray and just think I don't see the
store over there with the sign
she's about to notice that I took her to
the right
place oh this is it what was that this
is it we found it you found
it we're back to our locker but we have
no clue how to get our stuff out it gave
us a receipt and that was
it h we're
back
we're on our way to find the
capsule what a man so
strong oh stop
it we think we're at our capso hotel but
once
again squiggly
lines that looks like it to
[Music]
me
[Music]
he
